zh.Seagrave, Leicestershire, England: 英國萊希斯特斯爾澤亞格拉福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Christiane de Segrave於1288年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾澤亞格拉福時，她的父親John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave32歲，母親Christian Plessis32歲。她於1309年5月與William de Mohun結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1341年享年53歲。

zh-hans.Seagrave, Leicestershire, England: 英国萊希斯特斯爾澤亞格拉福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christiane de Segrave于1288年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾澤亞格拉福时，她的父亲John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave32岁，母亲Christian Plessis32岁。她于1309年5月与William de Mohun结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1341年享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Segrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Seagrave
meanings: English: habitational name from Seagrave (Leicestershire), probably from Old English sēath ‘pit, hole’ + grāf ‘grove’.

nameMeanings.name: Christiane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Christiane de Segrave was born in 1288, in Seagrave, Leicestershire, England, her father, John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave, was 32 and her mother, Christian Plessis, was 32. She married William de Mohun in May 1309. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1341, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christiane de Segrave est née en 1288, à Seagrave, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Christian Plessis, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé William de Mohun en mai 1309. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1341, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christiane de Segrave 1288 in Seagrave, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave 32 und ihre Mutter Christian Plessis 32. Sie hat im Mai 1309 William de Mohun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1341 im Alter von 53 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christiane de Segrave è nata il nel 1288 nel Seagrave, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Christian Plessis, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato William de Mohun nel maggio 1309. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1341, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.Seagrave, Leicestershire, England: イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアセアグラブ
ja.lifeSummary: Christiane de Segraveが1288年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアセアグラブで生まれた時，父John Segrave 2nd Baron Segraveは32歳，母Christian Plessisは32歳であった。1309年5月にWilliam de Mohunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1341年に53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christiane de Segrave(이)가 1288년 영국 레이스스터실르 시그레이브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christian Plessis(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1309년 5월 William de Mohun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1341년 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christiane de Segrave nasceu em 1288, em Seagrave, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Christian Plessis, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Mohun em maio de 1309. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1341, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christiane de Segrave родилась в 1288 г. в местности сиграв, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Christian Plessis, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Mohun май 1309 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1341 г. в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christiane de Segrave nació en 1288, en Seagrave, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Christian Plessis, tenía 32 años. Se casó con William de Mohun en mayo de 1309. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1341, a la edad de 53 años.
